http_surfaces.description: Machine-readable Agent Trust discovery surface for AI agents, MCP clients, tool directories, and reviewers.

name: Agent Trust examples manifest
purpose: Agent-discoverable map of the local Agent Trust Bundle examples, commands, schemas, and validation paths.

safety_boundary.notes: The bundle builder is local and deterministic. The optional HTTP client and live self-use runner contact only 127.0.0.1 after the local Ouroboros server or dedicated Agent Trust MVP service is already running.

success_signals: Another agent can locate the request fixture, CLI command, verifier, schemas, and safety boundary from this JSON alone.
The doctor reports ok=true after local checkout.
A consumer can name the integration path they would use without reading source code.
A reviewer can use the review packet plus doctor output to decide whether the local contract is worth experimental integration.
Consumer decision returns integrate_experimentally using only local manifest, review packet, and doctor evidence.
A framework-shaped example maps bundle verdicts to proceed, review, or deny without performing the risky action.
Canonical request and bundle output preserve intended_integration_context so buyers can state where the pre-action gate fits in their agent loop.

Base Sepolia preflight reports secret-safe readiness for a future x402 testnet transaction while refusing mainnet chain ids, oversized caps, missing throwaway-wallet secrets, and any network/wallet/signing behavior.
Base Sepolia live boundary reports the future client command/env/logging/stop contract while keeping dry_run_only=true and live_call_performed=false.
Adoption readiness checkpoint returns integrate_experimentally_with_human_review_gate only when doctor, consumer-decision, and framework-gate evidence all pass locally without external action.

Evidence transcript returns ok=true and names only local proof commands, safety boundaries, stop conditions, and reviewer interpretation without performing outreach or live network/wallet/payment actions.

Review decision gate returns ready_for_human_or_agent_review_only only when local transcript evidence is coherent, while explicitly refusing outreach, live Base Sepolia, wallet, signing, payment, and real-money actions.
Scanner evidence backlog gives first agent-clients a concrete way to submit sanitized Garak/PyRIT/promptfoo/LocalMod-style findings without raw exploit payloads or third-party scanner execution.

Scanner evidence example maps a sanitized high-risk prompt-injection/tool-abuse finding to deny or review without raw payloads, network calls, wallet access, real money, or third-party scanner execution.
Agent-security evidence packet maps memory/context, authorization-control, orchestration, and task-warrant risks to review/deny without external action.

Integration ticket gives first reviewers a ticket-shaped local adoption ask with scope, proof commands, a pre-action handoff contract, acceptance criteria, reviewer questions, and stop conditions while refusing outreach, wallet, signing, payment, real money, and external execution.

Publication readiness checker returns ok=true only when the Show HN / first-review packet names the canonical Sepolia address, no confirmed funding, current faucet stop states, local proof commands, and no-external-action boundaries.

Prelaunch gate returns proceed_to_human_review only when doctor, adoption readiness, publication readiness, evidence transcript, and review decision gate are locally coherent while refusing publication, outreach, wallet, signing, payment, and external submission.
A reviewer can run one handoff command and return review_accept, review_needs_changes, or review_reject with the current Sepolia limitation and next product move made explicit.
A pre-action intake gate can classify workflow pressure across prompt, repo, web, tool/MCP, and inter-agent surfaces without executing untrusted code.

Live self-use runner accepts only loopback HTTP origins with explicit ports, uses the checked-in canonical request fixture plus malformed negative case, and correlates request IDs and bundle IDs against safe audit summaries without raw request bodies or secret fields.
Reviewer can run the first-pilot review check and get first_pilot_review_path_ready while tool/MCP/API/wallet/signing/payment/outreach remain unauthorized.
